Jumpstart AIBuild First, Learn As You Go

8-Week Entry Guide | From Zero to AI Application Developer

Start Reading →
Quick Navigation
🚀

Act First, Prepare Later

Break the mindset of "getting prepared before entering". In AI, change is constant—learning by doing is the optimal strategy.

🎯

Practice-Oriented

Every chapter contains actionable techniques you can implement immediately.

🗺️

Clear Roadmap

Complete learning path from cognition, fundamentals, practice, advanced topics to career guidance.

💼

Career Support

Resume optimization, interview techniques, and onboarding guidance for the full job search process.

🌏

Four Languages

Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean—comprehensive coverage.

🌙

Dark Mode

Switch between light and dark modes to protect your eyes.
